summary: The user is building predictive models using Python and R and seeks advice on feature engineering techniques to improve their skills. They are working on a solo project for their Data Mining class, focusing on customer purchase data, and request tips for handling high cardinality categorical variables and visualizing their analysis results effectively.
facts: The user is using Python and R to build predictive models. The user is working on a solo project for their Data Mining class. The user is interested in applying feature engineering techniques to their customer purchase data. The user is trying to identify patterns and trends in their customer purchase data. The user plans to use grouping and binning methods to handle high cardinality categorical variables. The user intends to create a formal presentation with a clear structure to present their findings. The user is considering using interactive visualizations to make it easier for their audience to explore the data. The user aims to highlight key findings and insights from their analysis in their presentation. The user feels more confident about presenting their findings to their professor and classmates after the chat.
